character_dossiers.name: Tom Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Challenges John Silver's authority, draws his knife during a confrontation.

character_dossiers.name: John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Asserts leadership over the crew, delivers speeches, and holds a pipe.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator and central figure, interacts with Silver and the sea-cook.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Gave the chart to Silver, referenced in dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Referred to as a nickname, associated with Silver's crew.
